statement: Three paper defects found and corrected same night: false age-proof claim (tokenomics v0.5.0), missing anchor semantics (whitepaper v0.7.11 anchor_trail + v0.7.12 anchor-media requirements), MESH-BFT single-network scope + undefined disjoint-DAG merge (8.1 limitation + interim publication-as-attested-bundle rule). Merge THEOREM remains future work, design-first track.
